completion_data.completion_summary: Expanded config/README.md with a Deployment Mechanisms section (all three mechanisms in modules/home/core/dotfiles.nix, with verified current line citations), a Naming Hazards section (config/ vs Nix config-argument shadowing; the three-way .claude/ / config/claude/ / ~/.claude/ collision), a preserve-and-flag WARNING for the intended config/claude/ force-overwrite behavior, and a corrected .zuliprc row; added a config/README.md cross-reference to dotfiles.nix's header comment.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for task 90 documenting all changes, decisions, and plan deviations.

memory_candidates.content: When adding a header-comment cross-reference to a Nix module during a multi-phase doc task, sequence the header edit BEFORE (or re-verify AFTER) writing any documentation that cites line numbers in that same file — even a 2-line comment insertion shifts every subsequent line number and silently staleness-poisons freshly-written citations. Always do the final line-range cross-check as the very last content step, against the file's actual current state, not the plan's pre-computed estimates.
